grant_title: The HMTF Pilot Award Program for Myelodysplastic Syndrome Research
project_area: Myelodysplastic Syndromes (MDS) research, including CMML and JMML, excluding AML and MPN
demographic_requirements: Early-career investigators (instructor, assistant professor and above) with faculty appointments in the US
eligibility_summary: Applicants must hold an MD, PhD, MD/PhD, or equivalent degree, have a faculty appointment in the US (instructor or higher) with laboratory space, conduct research at a non-profit institution, focus on non-incremental MDS research, and not be affiliated with for-profit industries. Only one application per PI is allowed.
